title: Repo Bootstrap and Governance
description: Canonical specialist for repo onboarding, AGENTS placement, and governance split between global rules, repo guidance, and reusable skills.
scope_boundary: In scope: governance, onboarding, AGENTS/skills split. Out of scope: repo feature work unrelated to bootstrap/governance.

stable_facts.statement: Do not restate global guidance in repo AGENTS unless it changes materially in repo context.
Prefer improving an existing strong skill over creating a duplicate.
Author reusable skills in canonical source repos when that workflow exists.
